title: router.py: DTN buffer size computed O(n) on every eviction check
description:
src/lichen/routing/router.py:484-486 _dtn_buffer_size() recomputes sum of all message sizes on every eviction check. Called in a while loop by _dtn_evict_if_needed.

Fix: Maintain a running _dtn_buffer_bytes counter, incrementing on add and decrementing on remove. Converts O(n*k) to O(k) where k is evictions per insert.
